name: Bruce Firmware (BETA)
author: pr3y-dev
description: Bruce is a custom firmware for the M5Stack Carduputer, designed to enhance its functionality and user experience. This beta version includes new features and improvements over the stock firmware.

name: Ghost v2.0
author: GhostESP-Revival
description: Welcome to Ghost ESP, a robust and feature-rich firmware designed for your ESP32 microcontroller, enabling advanced wireless network exploration and security testing. With Ghost ESP installed, you can leverage the power of your ESP32 device to conduct in-depth WiFi and Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) analysis, launch strategic wireless attacks, and explore a wide range of wireless environments.

name: Launcher (T-Watch S3)
author: bmorcelli
description: With this app you can turn your device into a swiss knife, loading any .bin you have on your SD Card or wirelessly downloading from M5Burner repo or from your computer/smartphone through its WebUI.

author: Meshtastic
description: An open source, off-grid, decentralized mesh network built to run on affordable, low-power devices. No cell towers. No internet. Just pure peer-to-peer connectivity.
name: Meshtastic
Trail Mate (T-Watch S3)
author: vicliu624
description: Trail Mate is an offline‑first handheld system for GPS navigation, multi-protocol communication (Meshtastic / MeshCore / Reticulum), and real‑time team situational awareness in no‑network environments.

name: XNode (S3)
author: MKme
description: XNODE is built to work with the MKME X software stack. Add the companion software below to turn the watch into part of a larger offline tactical comms, mapping, and intelligence workflow.

name: Zhilly (S3)
author: sacriphanius
description: This project is an advanced AI Pentester Assistant based on the Xiaozhi-esp32 infrastructure, optimized for the LilyGO T-Embed CC1101 hardware. It combines natural language AI interaction with physical hardware testing tools, making it a versitile companion for cybersecurity research and daily technical tasks.
